case_title: STELLA MUNOZ et al VS. POST HOTEL, A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION, FORM UNKNOWN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-07-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-17-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST LAWRENCE MOY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-04-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-20-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, STELLA AN INDIVIDUAL MUNOZ, DANNY AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT POST HOTEL, A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION, FORM UNKNOWN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-13-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-02-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-20-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
